text: What was the exact moment you knew you liked me?
Send me the most flattering selfie you can take in 30 seconds.
Describe me using only three words, then explain each one.
What's a tiny thing I do that you secretly love?
Blow me a kiss and tell me where you'd want to be right now together.
Plan our dream date night in three messages.
What's your favorite memory of us so far?
Record a 15-second voice note saying what you love about me.
Save your next kiss for me and describe how you imagine it.
Where do you picture us in five years?
What's something you find irresistibly attractive about me?
Send a flirty text as if we just met for the first time.
Describe your idea of a perfect romantic getaway for just us two.
What's a compliment you've wanted to give me but were too shy to say?
Plan a surprise for me and don't tell me what it is yet.
Share a bucket-list adventure you'd want us to do together someday.
What's the boldest thing you'd do to surprise me?
Pick our next spontaneous trip destination — right now, no overthinking.
